hero.eyebrow: Established 2017 · Part of the TMAI Group
hero.title: Premium {w1} & {w2} Products
hero.lead: From premium cookware to central-heating radiators and boilers — we engineer and manufacture metal products for distributors, retailers, and consumers.

capabilities.heading: Manufacturing Capabilities
capabilities.lead: We pair advanced machinery with skilled craftsmanship to produce cookware and heating products built to international quality standards.

casting.title: Casting & Forming
casting.desc: Die-casting, forging, and pressing of aluminum into lightweight, durable bodies with even heat distribution.

coating.title: Surface Treatment & Coating
coating.desc: From PFOA-free non-stick and stone-coated finishes for cookware to durable powder coating for radiators — each finish applied to exacting standards.

oem.title: Custom & OEM Production
oem.desc: Manufacture under your brand or ours — with full control over materials, finishes, dimensions, and packaging.

divisions.heading: Two Product Lines, Built to the Same Standard

cookware.title: Cookware
cookware.desc: A wide range of fry pans, sauce pans, casseroles, woks and grills across 30+ collections — in forged aluminum, die-cast, and stone-coated finishes, each offered in multiple sizes.

radiators.title: Heating Radiators
radiators.desc: Aluminum and bimetal panel radiators, plus towel radiators — with EN-rated heat output for homes and commercial spaces.

process.heading: From Raw Material to Finished Product

material.title: Material Selection
material.desc: Premium aluminum and bimetal sourced from certified suppliers.

forming.title: Forming & Shaping
forming.desc: Precision die-casting, pressing, and forming on our production lines.

finishing.title: Finishing & Assembly
finishing.desc: Coating and surface treatment, then assembly of handles, lids, valves, and fittings.

qc.title: Quality Control
qc.desc: Every unit inspected and tested to ISO 9001 standards before packaging and shipment.

cta.heading: Partner With Us
cta.lead: Whether you're a distributor looking for reliable supply, a retailer seeking quality products, or a business with custom manufacturing needs — we'd like to hear from you.

about.metaDescription: TanDem — established 2017, a Kyrgyzstan-based manufacturer of premium cookware and central-heating radiators and boilers, built to internationally certified standards. Part of the TMAI group.
about.title: Cookware and Heating, Made to Last
about.subtitle: Quality cookware and heating, serving clients across Central Asia, Russia, and Europe.

story.heading: Who We Are
story.p1: Established in 2017, TanDem LLC is a metalworking manufacturer and part of the international TMAI group. We produce two core lines — premium cookware and central-heating radiators and boilers — for distributors, retailers, and consumers.
story.p2: Our manufacturing facility is based in Kyrgyzstan's Free Economic Zone “Bishkek” — an ideal gateway location from which we ship to partners across Central Asia, Russia, and Europe.
story.p3: Backed by the group's expertise in metal forging, casting, and surface treatment, we pair advanced machinery with skilled craftsmanship and manufacture to internationally certified standards — under our own brand or yours, with full OEM and custom production.

certs.heading: Certifications & Compliance
certs.intro: Our products are manufactured to the internationally recognized standards held across the TMAI group — independently audited and tested. Click any certificate to view it in full.

quality.title: Quality Without Compromise
quality.desc: Every product passes rigorous multi-point inspection. We test for structural integrity, surface finish, dimensional accuracy, and performance before any unit leaves our facility.

certified.title: Certified & Compliant
certified.desc: Independently audited and tested — ISO 9001, OHSAS 18001, amfori BSCI, and TÜV Rheinland — so partners can buy with confidence.

flexible.title: Flexible Manufacturing
flexible.desc: From a single collection to full OEM and white-label production, we adapt materials, finishes, and packaging to each partner’s needs.

radiators.metaDescription: Explore TanDem's heating radiator catalog: aluminum, bimetal, and towel radiators with EN-rated heat output. OEM and custom manufacturing available.
radiators.title: Radiator Catalog
radiators.subtitle: High-efficiency aluminum and bimetal heating radiators engineered for optimal heat output, durability, and modern aesthetics.
radiators.customLead: We offer OEM and white-label production. Custom dimensions, heat outputs, finishes, and configurations available. Minimum order quantities apply.

products.metaDescription: Explore TanDem's product divisions — premium cookware and central-heating radiators, with full OEM and custom manufacturing.
products.title: Our Product Range
products.subtitle: Two divisions, one foundation — precision aluminum casting, expert surface coating, and rigorous quality control.

cookware.title: Cookware
cookware.desc: Fry pans, sauce pans, casseroles, woks, grills and roasters across 30+ collections — in forged aluminum, die-cast, and stone-coated finishes, each offered in multiple sizes.

radiators.title: Heating Radiators
radiators.desc: EN-rated heat output, durable powder-coated finishes, and a clean modern profile — built for reliable heating in homes and commercial spaces.

custom.heading: Need Custom Manufacturing?
custom.lead: We offer OEM and white-label production across both product divisions. Choose your materials, finishes, dimensions, and packaging. Minimum order quantities apply.
